title: Contact Page Fields

fields.label: Address
fields.name: contact_address
fields.instructions: Enter the full address
fields.default_value:
Mountain House Unity Center
1170 Stonebridge Drive
Mountain House, CA 95391

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.name: contact_phone
fields.instructions: Main contact phone number

fields.label: Email Address
fields.name: contact_email
fields.instructions: Main contact email

fields.label: Office Hours
fields.name: contact_hours
fields.instructions: Office hours or availability information
fields.default_value:
Office Hours:
Mon-Fri: 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Weekend: By Appointment

fields.label: Google Maps Embed URL
fields.name: contact_map_embed
fields.instructions: Paste the Google Maps embed URL for directions

fields.label: Facebook URL
fields.name: contact_social_facebook
fields.instructions: Facebook page link

fields.label: Instagram URL
fields.name: contact_social_instagram
fields.instructions: Instagram page link

fields.label: Twitter/X URL
fields.name: contact_social_twitter
fields.instructions: Twitter/X page link

fields.label: YouTube URL
fields.name: contact_social_youtube
fields.instructions: YouTube channel link

fields.label: LinkedIn URL
fields.name: contact_social_linkedin
fields.instructions: LinkedIn company page

fields.label: Hero Title
fields.name: contact_hero_title
fields.instructions: Main title for the contact page hero section

fields.label: Hero Subtitle
fields.name: contact_hero_subtitle
fields.instructions: Subtitle or description for the contact page hero
fields.default_value: We're here to help. Reach out with any question, request, or feedback.

fields.label: Contact Form Shortcode
fields.name: contact_form_shortcode
fields.instructions: Shortcode for the contact form (if using a form plugin like Contact Form 7 or WPForms)

fields.label: Enable Contact Form
fields.name: contact_enable_form
fields.instructions: Show or hide the contact form section

description: Custom fields for the Contact Us page

fields.instructions: Full name of the person enrolling

fields.instructions: Contact phone number

fields.instructions: Program the person wants to enroll in

fields.label: Enrollment Status
fields.name: enrollment_status
fields.instructions: Current status of this enrollment

fields.name: enrollment_message
fields.instructions: Any questions or special requests from the applicant

fields.label: Submission Date
fields.name: enrollment_date
fields.instructions: Date when this enrollment was submitted

fields.label: Admin Notes
fields.name: enrollment_notes
fields.instructions: Internal notes for board members only

fields.label: Event Description
fields.name: event_description
fields.instructions: Please provide as much information as possible, including event category detail if you selected other

fields.label: Will there be a host or guest speaker?
fields.name: has_host_speaker

fields.instructions: Please select one or more options

fields.name: rectangular_tables
fields.instructions: Please enter the number of rectangular tables needed

fields.label: Equipment
fields.name: equipment
fields.instructions: Please select all require options

fields.label: Volunteers

fields.label: Helpers
fields.name: helpers
fields.instructions: Please enter the number of paid helpers needed

fields.label: Comments
fields.name: comments
fields.instructions: Please share any additional information that will help with the event planning, and flyer creation

fields.label: Phone Number
